input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule T.5.4.1 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: t.5.4.1
            TITLE: water cooled engines must use only plain water with no additives of any kind

            CONTENT:
            rule T.5.4.1: Water cooled engines must use only plain water with no additives of any kind
T.5.4.1 Water cooled engines must use only plain water with no additives of any kind

final_answer: Water cooled engines must use only plain water with no additives of any kind
